subject: Add dummy script for k8s CSIT
commit_message:
Add dummy script for k8s CSIT

Added a script for k8s CSIT that creates dummy robot result files.
This is required for jenkins job verification to pass.

Issue-ID: POLICY-4541
Signed-off-by: zrrmmua <ramesh.murugan.iyer@est.tech>
Change-Id: I5e96976c3b8bfbea486d222c9fd56293ab19e8ab

Patch Set 1:

I am okay with this, but we could have handled it in the Jenkins jobs config as well - https://github.com/onap/ci-management/blob/master/jjb/policy/policy-csit.yaml

Instead of adding k8s-csit jobs to the existing project, we could have added a new project for k8s-csit. That way it could only trigger the master branch k8s csit. And we don't need to add dummy scripts, and extra jobs, that will pass always.
Example -

- project:
    name: policy-xacml-pdp-project-k8s-csit
    jobs:
      - '{project-name}-{stream}-project-k8s-csit-verify-{functionality}'
      - '{project-name}-{stream}-project-k8s-csit-{functionality}'
    project-name: 'policy-xacml-pdp'
    recipients: 'jrh3@att.com jorge.hernandez-herrero@att.com'
    project: 'policy/docker'
    stream:
      - 'master':
          branch: 'master'
    functionality:
      - 'xacml-pdp'
    trigger_jobs:
      - 'policy-xacml-pdp-{stream}-merge-java'
      - 'policy-docker-{stream}-merge-java'

Patch Set 1:

>       - 'policy-docker-{stream}-merge-java'

Hi Ram, Yes I agree, we can handle it this way in ci-management as well. I can take this approach

Abandoned

K8s CSIT will be restricted to master branch in ci-management
